entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the primary crop studied for heat tolerance

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Temperatures above 35 °C that negatively impact plant growth and development

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function and yield under high temperature conditions

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of the plant to produce viable seeds

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of seed formation and growth

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIATION
entities.description: The observable physical differences among genotypes

entities.name: GENOMIC RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The genetic similarities and differences between genotypes

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for genetic analysis

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: Country where chickpea genotypes were grown and assessed

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where chickpea genotypes were grown and assessed

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: City in India where ICRISAT is located and heat stress trials were conducted

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the timing of plant developmental stages

entities.name: AGROMORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the physical structure and growth characteristics of the plant

entities.name: FLORAL INITIATION
entities.description: The process of starting flower development

entities.name: POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of pod formation and growth

entities.name: LIFE CYCLE
entities.description: The total duration from germination to maturity

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the plant

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the produced seeds

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Analysis of Variance used to determine statistical significance of trait differences

entities.name: DZ-CR-0034
entities.description: A specific chickpea genotype found to be highly heat-tolerant

entities.name: DZ-CR-0026
entities.description: A specific chickpea genotype found to be highly heat-sensitive

entities.name: MIDDLE EASTERN GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material from Middle Eastern origins showing introgression in Ethiopian genotypes
